ValidationRule.description: Prevents an Opportunity from being saved as Closed Won if any of the required project fields are blank: Name, Account, Estimated Start Date, Estimated End Date, Service Line, or Project Classification.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Won"), OR( ISBLANK(Name), ISBLANK(AccountId), ISBLANK(Estimated_Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(Estimated_End_Date__c), ISBLANK(Service_Line__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Project_Classification__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Before marking this Opportunity as Closed Won, please complete all required project fields: Name, Account, Estimated Start Date, Estimated End Date, Service Line, and Project Classification.
